6:
WITH cust_cons AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2013'
      AND ym.Date LIKE '2013-%'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
seg_min AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM cust_cons
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
    (MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN min_consumption END) -
     MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN min_consumption END)) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN min_consumption END) -
     MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN min_consumption END)) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN min_consumption END) -
     MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN min_consumption END)) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_min;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS year,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4)
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MAX(CASE WHEN year='2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2012,
           MAX(CASE WHEN year='2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2013
    FROM yearly
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           CASE WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012
           END AS pct_increase
    FROM pivot
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT Segment FROM pct WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM pct)) AS biggest_increase_segment,
    (SELECT Segment FROM pct WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM pct)) AS lowest_increase_segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

  SELECT CustomerID,
         SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_spent,
         SUM(Amount) AS total_qty
  FROM transactions_1k

),
top AS (
  SELECT CustomerID
  FROM spend
  ORDER BY total_spent DESC
  LIMIT 1
)

       s.total_spent / s.total_qty AS average_price_per_item,

JOIN top t ON s.CustomerID = t.CustomerID;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT
    UPPER(Admission) AS adm,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_cnt
  FROM Patient
  WHERE Admission IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY UPPER(Admission)
),
perc AS (
  SELECT
    adm,
    ROUND(100.0 * male_cnt / total, 2) AS male_pct
  FROM stats
  WHERE adm IN ('+','-')
),
diff AS (
  SELECT
    ABS(
      (SELECT male_pct FROM perc WHERE adm = '+') -
      (SELECT male_pct FROM perc WHERE adm = '-')
    ) AS deviation,
    CASE
      WHEN (SELECT male_pct FROM perc WHERE adm = '+') >
           (SELECT male_pct FROM perc WHERE adm = '-')
      THEN 'Inpatient'
      ELSE 'Outpatient'
    END AS more_male
  FROM perc
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT more_male, deviation FROM diff;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

WITH first_loan AS (
  SELECT account_id
  FROM loan
  WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
  ORDER BY loan_id ASC
  LIMIT 1
),
client_account AS (
  SELECT d.client_id, f.account_id
  FROM first_loan f
  JOIN disp d ON d.account_id = f.account_id
),
start_bal AS (
  SELECT t.balance AS bal
  FROM trans t
  JOIN client_account ca ON t.account_id = ca.account_id
  WHERE t.date = '1993-03-22'
  ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
end_bal AS (
  SELECT t.balance AS bal
  FROM trans t
  JOIN client_account ca ON t.account_id = ca.account_id
  WHERE t.date = '1998-12-27'
  ORDER BY t.trans_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN sb.bal IS NULL OR sb.bal = 0 THEN NULL
       ELSE (eb.bal - sb.bal) * 1.0 / sb.bal
  END AS increase_rate
FROM start_bal sb, end_bal eb;	----- bird -----	financial

WITH female_clients AS (
  SELECT c.client_id,
         (strftime('%Y','now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) -
         (strftime('%m-%d','now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
  FROM client c
  WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
max_age AS (
  SELECT MAX(age) AS max_age FROM female_clients
),
oldest_female AS (
  SELECT fc.client_id
  FROM female_clients fc
  JOIN max_age ma ON fc.age = ma.max_age
),
client_avg AS (
  SELECT d.client_id, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_amount
  FROM trans t
  JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
  JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
  GROUP BY d.client_id
),
min_avg AS (
  SELECT MIN(ca.avg_amount) AS min_avg
  FROM client_avg ca
  JOIN oldest_female of ON ca.client_id = of.client_id
)
SELECT a.account_id
FROM oldest_female of
JOIN client_avg ca ON of.client_id = ca.client_id
JOIN disp d ON of.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE ca.avg_amount = (SELECT min_avg FROM min_avg);	----- bird -----	financial
